Class ProductController

java.lang.Object
com.gcu.inventoryapp.controller.ProductController
@Controller @RequestMapping("/products") public class ProductController extends Object
Controller responsible for handling product-related operations. Provides functionality to view, create, update, and delete products.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    ProductController(ProductService productService)
    Constructor for ProductController.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    String
    deleteProduct(Long id)
    Deletes a product by ID if it is not associated with inventory or orders.

    Displays a list of all products.

    Saves a new or updated product.
    String
    showAddForm(org.springframework.ui.Model model)
    Displays the form to add a new product.
    String

  • Constructor Details

    • ProductController

      public ProductController(ProductService productService)
      Constructor for ProductController.
      Parameters:
      productService - service used to manage product operations

  • Method Details

    • listProducts

      @GetMapping public String listProducts(org.springframework.ui.Model model, @RequestParam(value="deleteError",required=false) String deleteError)
      Displays a list of all products. Also handles optional error messaging for failed delete operations.
      Parameters:
      model - the model used to pass product data to the view
      deleteError - optional error message if delete fails
      Returns:
      the products view page

    • showAddForm

      @GetMapping("/add") public String showAddForm(org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays the form to add a new product.
      Parameters:
      model - the model used to pass a new product object to the view
      Returns:
      the product form page

    • saveProduct

      @PostMapping("/save") public String saveProduct(@Valid @ModelAttribute("product") @Valid Product product, org.springframework.validation.BindingResult result)
      Saves a new or updated product.
      Parameters:
      product - the product object submitted from the form
      result - contains validation results
      Returns:
      redirect to products page or back to form if validation fails

    • showEditForm

      @GetMapping("/edit/{id}") public String showEditForm(@PathVariable Long id, org.springframework.ui.Model model)
      Displays the form to edit an existing product.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the product to edit
      model - the model used to pass product data to the view
      Returns:
      the product form page

    • deleteProduct

      @GetMapping("/delete/{id}") public String deleteProduct(@PathVariable Long id)
      Deletes a product by ID if it is not associated with inventory or orders.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the product to delete
      Returns:
      redirect to products page with optional error message if delete fails
